introSection: Tiger Coaster was a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Hydro Adventures in Poplar Bluff, Missouri, USA.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train resembles a purple tiger.

fullText:
Tiger Coaster was a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Hydro Adventures in Poplar Bluff, Missouri, USA.

The rides follows oval layout.

Blue track and blue supports.

The train resembles a purple tiger.
